## Summary

Describe clearly what this PR changes and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] docs
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] chore

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run build` completes successfully
- [ ] Extension loads correctly from `dist/`
- [ ] Core flows tested manually

## UI evidence (if applicable)

Attach screenshots or short video.

## Risks

List known risks, edge cases, or pending tasks.

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is focused and minimal
- [ ] Documentation updated when needed
- [ ] No secrets or sensitive data included
